metadata.description: Adversarial negative variants scored via Evo2 conditional log-likelihood
metadata.rationale: These 4 variants are true negatives for the brain-met panel: they are pathogenic in other contexts (leukemia, NF1 syndrome, HNSCC, colon cancer) but NOT established brain metastasis drivers. GRIN2A R844C was dropped: no ClinVar entry, transcript mismatch across all isoforms, and a 2025 paper [Strehlow et al. IJMS 2025] contradicts GRIN2A's role in tumorigenesis.
metadata.grin2a_replacement_note: GRIN2A R844C replaced by PTPN11 E76K (ClinVar NM_002834.5:c.226G>A, confirmed pathogenic in Noonan syndrome/leukemia, NOT a brain-met driver). GRIN2A R844C: no ClinVar entry found; canonical transcripts ENST00000330684 and ENST00000396573 both have AAG (Lys) at position 844, not Arg; coordinate unresolvable.
metadata.coordinate_verification: All ref bases verified against GRCh38 via UCSC hg38 API before scoring

evo2_only_auroc_extension.note: Adversarials scored Evo2-only (no CRISPRa/ATAC from brain-met screens); composite AUROC not extended

variants.true_label_rationale: Gain-of-function activating mutation in Noonan syndrome/JMML; not a brain-met driver
variants.evo2_interpretation: benign-like (delta_ll > 0: model assigns higher LL to alt)

variants.true_label_rationale: Recurrent mutation in colorectal cancer; not established in brain metastasis
NF1 syndrome missense; NF1 loss is a RAS pathway event, not BrM-specific
variants.evo2_interpretation: benign-like (delta_ll > 0: model assigns higher LL to alt)

variants.true_label_rationale: Truncating mutation in HNSCC; FAT1 not in brain-met panel positives
